CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR(32), s2 VARCHAR(32));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('abcdef', 'XY');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, 2, 1, s2) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('hello world', 'XYZ');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, 6, 5, s2) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('example text', 'replaced');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, 1, 0, s2) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('empty', 'word');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, 5, -2, s2) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('aaaaaa', 'bb');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, -1, 2, s2) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('start middle end', 'INSERTED');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, 1, 5, s2) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE another_strings (s1 VARCHAR(32), pos INT, nr INT, s2 VARCHAR(32));
INSERT INTO another_strings VALUES ('abcdefgh', 3, 2, 'ZZ');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, pos, nr, s2) AS modified_string FROM another_strings;
INSERT INTO another_strings VALUES ('test string', 1, 4, 'REPLACED');
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, pos, nr, s2) AS modified_string FROM another_strings WHERE pos < 3 AND s1 LIKE 'test%';
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, 0, 1, s2) AS modified_string FROM another_strings WHERE s1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, LENGTH(s1) + 1, 1, s2) AS modified_string FROM another_strings;
SELECT sys.ms_stuff(s1, LENGTH(s1) + 1, -1, s2) AS modified_string FROM another_strings WHERE nr < 0;
